Hero.headline: Technology mastery shaped by European expertise and nearshore proximity.
Hero.subheadline: Custom enterprise software designed with clarity, ownership, and balance, built to support complex operations and long-term growth.

Story.title: The dot. The pause. The potential.
Story.intro: dotWhite starts with a simple idea: every complex system can become clear when the right people ask the right questions at the right time.

origin.title: From Dot to Direction
origin.text: A dot is the beginning. It marks a position, then a path. Our work starts the same way: one clear decision at a time.
origin.details: We map context, constraints, and business intent before writing a single implementation ticket.

enterprise.title: Built for Real Complexity
enterprise.text: We build custom enterprise software and internal tools that handle evolving workflows, data volume, and integrations.
enterprise.details: Architecture stays modular and traceable, so teams can evolve safely without costly rewrites.

feeling.title: Calm by Design
feeling.text: Our products should feel intentional and steady: minimal, precise, and never loud.
feeling.details: Interaction quality is treated as a product requirement, not a final visual polish pass.

client.title: How It Should Feel
client.text: Working with dotWhite should feel guided and reliable, with complexity handled quietly in the background.
client.details: Delivery is transparent and calm, with checkpoints, ownership, and measurable progress.

Story.enterprise: We build custom enterprise software and internal tools for high-volume workflows, integrating with platforms like SharePoint, Salesforce, and SAP.
Story.outro: Working with dotWhite should feel calm, steady, and intentional, with complexity handled quietly in the background.

CoreValues.title: Principles Behind Every Delivery
CoreValues.subtitle: Our values describe the challenges we overcome daily to deliver high quality services and maintain a healthy work-life balance.

clarity.title: Create Clarity
clarity.text: It is easy to get lost and lose focus in complex delivery environments. We need a clear point of reference and a practical mental map that guides decisions through changing requirements. We constantly work to transform ambiguity into shared direction.

ownership.title: Take Ownership
ownership.text: Ownership empowers continuous growth and strengthens problem solving at every level of delivery. It is something we choose to take willingly, with accountability and care, in service of shared goals and long-term outcomes.

balance.title: Seek Balance
balance.text: True balance is not a fixed state. It is a rhythm shaped by adaptation, timing, and conscious tradeoffs between focus and flow. We do not chase balance as a destination; we practice it daily to sustain quality execution.

KPIs.title: Measurable Outcomes, Not Just Activity
KPIs.subtitle: We track delivery quality through operational signals that matter to leadership and execution teams.

one.label: On-time Delivery
one.text: Milestones delivered on schedule across scoped enterprise workstreams.

two.label: Faster Operations
two.text: Average execution speed improvement after internal platform rollout.

three.label: Service Reliability
three.text: Production stability maintained across high-volume business processes.

four.label: Team Throughput
four.text: Higher output per team enabled by automation and cleaner workflows.

HowItWorks.title: Nearshore Process, Structured End-to-End
HowItWorks.subtitle: A practical delivery rhythm designed to reduce uncertainty, keep alignment high, and move from discovery to long-term evolution.

understand.title: Understand
understand.text: We map your operational context, constraints, and business outcomes before writing code.
understand.outcome: Result: shared direction before implementation begins.

align.title: Align
align.text: We align architecture, scope, and delivery cadence with your teams and decision stakeholders.
align.outcome: Result: fewer late surprises and tighter stakeholder alignment.

build.title: Build
build.text: We deliver in structured increments, integrating with your ecosystem and validating quality continuously.
build.outcome: Result: steady progress with visible quality gates.

evolve.title: Evolve
evolve.text: We optimize over time with measurable improvements in reliability, throughput, and maintainability.
evolve.outcome: Result: long-term resilience and performance gains.

WhatWeBuild.title: Enterprise Software Built Around Your Real Business Constraints
WhatWeBuild.subtitle: You get systems designed for your governance model, your workflows, and your pace of change, so your teams can execute with less friction and better predictability.

custom.title: Custom Enterprise Software
custom.text: Purpose-built systems designed around your business model, governance, and growth plans.

internal.title: Internal Tools for Operations
internal.text: Operational platforms that reduce friction across departments and improve execution quality.

integrations.title: Platform Integrations
integrations.text: Seamless integration with ecosystems like SharePoint, Salesforce, SAP, and adjacent tooling.

volume.title: High-Volume Workflow Handling
volume.text: Architectures engineered for throughput, reliability, and process consistency at scale.

tech.title: Platforms and Tools We Integrate With

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Teams Running Complex Operations

FinalCta.title: Ready to make an impact? Let's meet.
FinalCta.subtitle1: Schedule a meeting and discover how we can build something great together.
FinalCta.subtitle2: We'll align on your goals, constraints, and the best path from idea to meaningful delivery.

Footer.description: We design dependable enterprise software and integrations for teams that need calm execution and measurable outcomes.
